name: Justin's Tuna Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped eggs and dill relish.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients (hot sauce, mustard) and mix well.
3. Gradually add the tuna to the mixture.
4. If the mixture is dry, stir in additional mayonnaise until desired consistency is reached.
5. Serve on crackers or use as a sandwich filling.
